div.class: o-checkbox form-check o_field_boolean o_boolean_toggle form-switch o_boolean_toggle_tooltip_fix
div.t-att-title: props.readonly and props.name === 'is_scrap' and !(props.record.data and props.record.data.tech_result) ? 'Tech result required to mark as scrap' : ''
div.t-on-click: props.readonly and props.name === 'is_scrap' and !(props.record.data and props.record.data.tech_result) ? onDisabledClick : null
